raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made a return to BestBuy for a purchase that had been made with my BestBuy credit card. The amount of the refund I received was a total of {$840.00}.

However, the refund was issued to two different charge accounts, one of them was a closed card. I told the cashier this at the time the refund was being processed, she advised me that the refund amount being refunded to the closed card, would eventually be diverted to the active account. I received a refund of {$340.00} to my active Best Buy credit card account, ending in XXXX. Additionally a refund of {$500.00} went to my closed card ending in XXXX. The rotal refund amount of {$840.00} would have satisfied the full balance on my active Best Buy credit account and also had an overpay amount of {$240.00}. 

Since this mis-directed refund transaction on XX/XX/year>, I have contacted Best Buy as well as CitiBank multiple times to get this issue corrected. As of today, I have had no resolve and CitiBank has charged me multiple times for not making adsitional payments late fees and punitive actions. Additionally, they are still in posession of my money that was in excess of the amount owed on my credit account at the time of the credit refund on XX/XX/year>, {$240.00}.
